question.label: Landing check-in
question.name: What's felt most clear or unclear for you in week two, Riley?
question.description: Lets Riley set the current onboarding picture before the conversation gets specific.

answer: I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.

assessment.note: He has technical reading confidence but lacks a clear picture of how decisions get made, which is a mild clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Decision-making map
new_queue.name: When you say 'how decisions are really made' — what part is least visible?

new_queue.label: Ownership edges
new_queue.name: Where do the ownership boundaries still feel fuzzy?

new_queue.label: Good looks like
new_queue.name: What does good look like for your part of the backend work right now?

new_queue.label: Context moments
new_queue.name: When do you find yourself needing more context before you move?

new_queue.label: Architecture assumptions
new_queue.name: What kinds of architecture calls feel easiest to misread here?

new_queue.label: Incident picture
new_queue.name: What have you picked up so far about incident expectations here?

new_queue.label: Support ask
new_queue.name: What would make the next couple of weeks easier for you?

new_queue.label: Useful introductions
new_queue.name: Who would be most useful for you to spend live time with next?

new_queue.label: Steady next steps
new_queue.name: What should we line up before our next check-in?

history.answer_excerpt: I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.
